name: thearchv-site
description: The ARCHV — Football history, illustrated. The owned site for @thearchvfc.

scripts.build: node scripts/check-csp-hash.mjs && tsc --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/build-content.mjs && node scripts/build-infograms.mjs && node scripts/build-feed.mjs && node scripts/build-rss.mjs && node scripts/build-day-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-lane-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-article-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-sport-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-glossary-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-standards-page.mjs && node scripts/verify-csp-pages.mjs
